full_text:
Wang Lang 王朗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lang (王朗). Served Cao Cao when Cao Cao governed Yan province, recommended Yu Jin. Wang Lang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
